text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, Meisho Doto invites me to join
her for dance practice.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four. Hop, step, three, four...

I can tell she's made a real effort to improve. Her
eye contact could use some improvement, but her
footwork is solid. Still...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waagh?! Two, three, four! One, twoo...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry, I just... I get embarrassed when people
cheer me on, and I, um... lose... my footing...
Nngh.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: One, three, two, four, one?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek, I c-c-can't slow down!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... I'm sorry that happened... I danced myself
into the corner of the room.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Why does this happen to me? Whenever I feel I'm
being watched, it's like my body stops listening...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What should we do? If nothing changes, my
concert performance will be a disaster...
choice_data_list: Let's pretend our practice is the real thing.
Let's find a good-luck charm for peace of mind.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh... the real thing? Wh-what do you mean
by—oh, that doesn't sound very good...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! Wh-why are we doing a mini concert? And,
people are actually here to watch?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's no way! I will do the apologizing, so
please cancel today's con—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, is... this where the stage is?! Th-they're
all... They're all looking at me, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeep! I really, really can't do this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Just wondrous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a creative and unique entrance! You truly
are a genius, Doto. Although, my own smarts
stand supreme!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... Why... are you here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I had heard a sworn ally of mine was
holding a mini concert, and so... I simply had to
come and stea—I mean... lend you my support!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, Doto. We must adorn this stage with our
unique and novel flair—with it, we mark the
beginning of a new theatrical age!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, wait a second... You see, this concert is
so I can practice—Waaagh!

The venue erupts with energy at the arrival of our
special guest. Meisho Doto finishes her eclectic
practice session with a few new skills up her
sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, do you think something that convenient...
a-actually exists?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Of course it does!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwaaagh?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-that s-surprised me... Oh, it's Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The one and only! And I know just the charm to
bring you happiness and peace of mind!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... So, you can fix me? Is there anything that
can help my nerves when I dance?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course there is! All it takes is a one-legged
hopscotch around the track! It's a race of
endurance. If you trip, it's game over! ☆

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hopscotch... around the track?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If that's what it takes... I'll start hopping right
now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hgwaugh!

Meisho Doto immediately trips on her first hop.
This solution appears to double as some good
core training.
